---
title: "Contact & References"
toc: true 
---
## Get in Touch

You can reach me via:

- **Email:** caitogrady@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/cait-oreilly-ogrady](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cait-oreilly-ogrady){target="_blank"}
- **GitHub:** [github.com/cait-oreilly](https://github.com/cait-oreilly){target="_blank"}

Or fill out the contact form below:

::: {style="max-width:500px;"}

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/xwvrlwwj" method="POST">

**Name:**
<input type="text" name="name" required style="width:100%; padding:8px; border:1px solid #3D7A72; border-radius:6px; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:15px;">

**Email:**
<input type="email" name="email" required style="width:100%; padding:8px; border:1px solid #3D7A72; border-radius:6px; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:15px;">

**Message:**
<textarea name="message" rows="5" required style="width:100%; padding:8px; border:1px solid #3D7A72; border-radius:6px; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:15px;"></textarea>

<button type="submit" style="padding:10px 24px; background-color:#3D7A72; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:6px; font-size:16px; cursor:pointer;">Send Message</button>

</form>

:::

## References

References are available upon request.
